title: Manifesto-style note
html:
Manifesto-style note — Yahir's recurring genre of self-talk writing. Short imperatives, second-person addressed to himself, distilled-from-a-moment-of-clarity, designed to be re-read later. The voice + vocabulary evolved from tentative bullets (2022) → confident declaratives (2026).

What it is

Self-instructive writing where Yahir captures a peak-clarity self-talk moment as a re-readable artifact. Distinct from todos (operational) and dream logs (observational) and breakup scripts (situational).

Hallmarks

  • Voice: second-person addressed to self ("you are an abundant source of good") OR first-person declarative ("I want to be the motherfucker that...")
  • Form: short bullets OR polished paragraphs
  • Vocabulary: rainbow + blaze + soul fire + walk with God's eyes + void + max effort commit + lynchpin + Big Life
  • Function: not for sharing — written to re-read later
  • Trigger: moment of clarity, often after a dip or a peak

Evolution

  1. 2022 06 04 — earliest tentative habits-list, hesitant voice.
  2. 2023 12 29 — establishes the master vocabulary (rainbow, prolific, lynchpin, mom-house, great work, autonomy).
  3. 2024 09 12 — Shanghai 14-bullet imperative list, voice locked in.
  4. 2025 03 15 — dip-and-pivot variant, manifesto-language used to climb out.
  5. 2026 02 26 — first-person, polished four-paragraph identity statement, most-quotable note in 2026 corpus.

Related

  • note as letter to self
  • soul as beacon
  • max effort commit
  • 2024 09 12 never forget do whatever
  • 2026 02 26 fall backwards into void
  • 2023 12 29 vision for big life
  • 2025 03 15 life feels heavy
